rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow users to stream shows and movies anywhere with an internet connection.
The system shall allow users to access a trial package of services for 1 month before creating an account.
The system shall require payment to be made when creating an account.
The system shall allow users to create an account with a secret password for security purposes.
The system shall enable premium users to provide suggestions of shows in the discussion room.
The system shall provide all users with access to a chat room for chatting and expressing views and comments.
The system shall allow the administrator to have control over shows broadcasted and maintain a proper timeline.
The system shall provide news feeds highlighting recent updates in MINIREELS in brief format.
The system shall allow users to add favourite videos to the LIKES list and watch them whenever needed.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows users to stream shows and movies anywhere with an internet connection.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The OTT media can be streamed anywhere with just the use of an internet connection.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users can access a trial package of services for 1 month before creating an account.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Users can have a trial package of the services offered for 1 month and further subscriptions are based on the amount paid categorised as normal users and premium users.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Creating an account involves payment to the services provided.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Creating an account involves payment to the services provided.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users can create an account with a secret password for security.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Hence the trial users could use the trial package for a month and create an account for them maintaining a secret password that makes their account safe from other people accessing it.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Premium users can provide suggestions of shows in the discussion room.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The premium users have the privilege of providing suggestions of the shows in the discussion room.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: All users have access to a chat room for chatting and expressing views and comments.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: All the users should be provided with the facility of a chat room where the users can chat and express their views and comments.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The administrator has control over shows broadcasted and maintains a proper timeline.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The administrator will have control over the shows broadcasted and maintain a proper timeline of the shows, movies and live shows.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: News feeds highlighting recent updates are available in MINIREELS in brief format.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: News feeds highlighting the recent updates in the world will also be available in MINIREELS in a brief format.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users can add favourite videos to LIKES list and watch them whenever needed.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Users can also add their favourite videos to LIKES list and watch them whenever needed (Figures 26.1–26.8).
